description: External action that must complete before pledges can settle (governance vote, council action, on-chain tx).
name: ExternalDependency

modules.description: Track external dependencies that block campaign pledges
modules.name: tracking

operations.name: SET_DEPENDENCY_DETAILS
operations.schema:
input SetDependencyDetailsInput {
    title: String
    description: String
    kind: DependencyKind
    expectedResolution: DateTime
    assignee: String
}

errors.description: Resolved dependencies cannot be moved back to a non-resolved status
errors.name: DependencyAlreadyResolvedError

operations.name: UPDATE_STATUS
operations.reducer:
if (state.status === 'RESOLVED' && action.input.status !== 'RESOLVED') throw new DependencyAlreadyResolvedError('Cannot move dependency out of RESOLVED state');
state.status = action.input.status;

operations.description: Mark a pledge as blocked by this dependency

errors.description: Pledge is already linked to this dependency
errors.name: PledgeAlreadyLinkedError

operations.name: LINK_PLEDGE
operations.reducer:
if (state.blocks.includes(action.input.pledgeId)) throw new PledgeAlreadyLinkedError('Pledge is already linked to this dependency');
state.blocks.push(action.input.pledgeId);
operations.template: Mark a pledge as blocked by this dependency

operations.description: Remove a pledge from this dependency's blocks list

errors.description: Pledge is not currently linked to this dependency
errors.name: PledgeNotLinkedError

operations.name: UNLINK_PLEDGE
operations.template: Remove a pledge from this dependency's blocks list

operations.name: RESOLVE

operations.description: Mark dependency as abandoned (no longer pursued)
operations.name: ABANDON
operations.reducer:
if (state.status === 'RESOLVED') throw new InvalidStatusTransitionError('Cannot abandon a resolved dependency');
state.status = 'ABANDONED';
operations.template: Mark dependency as abandoned (no longer pursued)

operations.description: Attach external references (proposal URL, on-chain tx, etc.)
operations.name: SET_EXTERNAL_REF
operations.template: Attach external references (proposal URL, on-chain tx, etc.)

global.schema:
type ExternalDependencyState {
    title: String!
    description: String
    kind: DependencyKind!
    blocks: [PHID!]!
    status: DependencyStatus!
    externalRef: DependencyRef
    expectedResolution: DateTime
    assignee: String
}

enum DependencyKind {
    GOVERNANCE_VOTE
    COUNCIL_ACTION
    ONCHAIN_TX
    OPERATIONAL
    OTHER
}

enum DependencyStatus {
    OPEN
    IN_PROGRESS
    RESOLVED
    BLOCKED
    ABANDONED
}

type DependencyRef {
    url: URL
    txHash: String
    proposalId: String
}
